title: Growth, Instability and Trends in Area, Production and Productivity of Coconuts in India

summary.audience: Agricultural planners, coconut producers and commodity researchers.
summary.method: Uses growth rates, instability measures, ARIMA and exponential smoothing on 1990–2018 data, with projections through 2021.
summary.insights: Major producers appear broadly stable; fitted time-series models provide short-term projections for Indian area, output and productivity.
